title: Support overlay mount with lowerdir inside container
body:
### Feature request description

Right now, it seems not possible to mount an outside directory as an overlay over an existing directory in the container so that writes go to that outside directory. Current functionality replaces the directory inside the container, which f.e. breaks the entrypoint if applied to `/usr/local`. See https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions/27312 for another use case.

.. so guess for now, I'll have to do it differently 😅

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
